## 🚀 Pull Request Checklist

### ⚡ Performance Check (The 100/100 Rule)
- [ ] I have run a Lighthouse audit and the score is still 100/100.
- [ ] No new heavy NPM packages were added.
- [ ] All new images are optimized (WebP/SVG).

### 🛠️ Description
- What does this PR change? 
- Does it fix a specific Issue? (e.g., Fixes #IssueNumber)

### 🧪 Quality Control
- [ ] My code follows the existing style of the project.
- [ ] I have tested this on a mobile device (Responsive Check).
- [ ] I have checked for "Layout Shifts" (CLS).

### 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)
Add any UI changes here.

*By submitting this PR, I agree to maintain the speed and integrity of Kamayega Bharat. 🇮🇳*
